title: Prove Windows compile, real herdr runtime, and token isolation
action: Add the blocking Windows Server 2022 proof for cells 1 and 2. The pinned workflow installs/selects upstream herdr Windows beta v0.7.4 or newer, compiles and tests the actual x86_64 MSVC production branches, and runs scripts/windows-runtime-smoke.ps1. The smoke must cover default and named-session endpoint resolution, ping/snapshot, observation, input/reply, long-lived subscription, herdr.exe stop/restart and gateway recovery, native roaming/local/profile roots, first-run and repeat-run token preservation, effective ACL inspection, and a real read attempt by a distinct ordinary non-admin user that is denied. Record the resolved runner image. Fail loudly on any skipped assertion. Preserve Linux CI and do not publish artifacts or claim Windows 11/full support from Server 2022 evidence.

truths: Windows-only production code compiles and its focused tests run on Server 2022
Real upstream herdr v0.7.4+ accepts gateway default and named-session request/subscription traffic
Gateway recovers after real herdr restart
Native first-run and repeat-run state behavior is proven
A distinct ordinary Windows user is denied reading the production-created token
Linux CI remains green and unchanged except for additive matrix/proof wiring
No publication or general support claim occurs

artifacts.substantive: pinned Windows Server 2022 blocking job running real production proof
fail-fast real herdr, state, restart, and second-user ACL smoke with no secret output

key_links: CI invokes the committed PowerShell smoke against the just-compiled production executable
The smoke invokes production endpoint and token-security paths rather than replicas
The job blocks completion of both implementation cells before any later packaging slice
prohibitions: No secret/token output or secret-shaped fixture
No administrator-only ACL assertion masquerading as second-user denial
No release, upload, tag, push, or support claim
No removal or weakening of Linux CI

trace.outcome: Windows Server 2022 production compile/tests and real Herdr runtime/token-isolation smoke pass on commit f94a120; gateway Windows endpoint, snapshot parsing, smoke selection, and supervisor restart path are fixed.
